zh.title: 约翰·迪预言全集 - 伊丽莎白时代宫廷占星师的天使对话与以诺魔法 | John Dee Prophecies
zh.description: 英国数学家、占星师约翰·迪（1527-1608）通过灵媒爱德华·凯利与天使对话，留下以诺魔法体系和神秘预言。涵盖政治、宗教、炼金术与超自然领域的15条预言及验证分析。
zh.keywords: 约翰迪,John Dee,以诺魔法,天使对话,爱德华凯利,伊丽莎白一世,占星术,炼金术,预言,神秘学
zh.ogTitle: 约翰·迪预言全集 | John Dee Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 伊丽莎白时代宫廷占星师约翰·迪通过天使对话留下的预言完整收录与验证分析。
zh.twitterDescription: 15条约翰·迪的天使对话预言，含真实度验证。以诺魔法体系创始人，伊丽莎白一世的宫廷顾问。

en.title: John Dee Prophecies - Angelic Conversations & Enochian Revelations (1527-1608) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Elizabethan mathematician, astrologer, and occultist John Dee (1527-1608) received prophecies through angelic conversations with scryer Edward Kelley. Complete archive of 15 predictions covering politics, religion, alchemy, and the supernatural, with verification analysis.
en.keywords: John Dee,Enochian magic,angelic conversations,Edward Kelley,Elizabeth I,astrology,alchemy,prophecy,occultism,Monas Hieroglyphica
en.ogTitle: John Dee Prophecies - Angelic Conversations & Enochian Revelations
en.ogDescription: 15 prophecies from Elizabethan occultist John Dee's angelic conversations. Full archive with real-world verification covering politics, religion, alchemy, and the supernatural.
en.twitterDescription: 15 predictions from John Dee's angelic conversations. Creator of Enochian magic, advisor to Queen Elizabeth I.
